title: Ender Dragon Reborn
description: Reimagines the ender dragon with a more aggressive and modern look
body:
Ender Dragon Reborn reimagines the severely outdated minecraft ender dragon with a more aggressive and modern wyvern design inspired by the new Ice and Fire II mod. The pack model maintains the fluid motions of the vanilla ender dragon but also attempts to make them a little more realistic and dragon-like.

_**Important Notes**_

- Check which version you are downloading, as versions above 1.21.1 have a slightly different technical structure for animation.
- This requires **Optifine** or **Entity Model Features**, and custom entity models must be enabled. Optifine has been tested to work for most versions.
- Ignore minecrafts warning for incompatible version. 

Please report any versions that may have problems working, or any bugs and glitches, and I will work to fix them.
